channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rainton Road needs sweeping, 17th May
item.description:
Hi there, This street is constantly full of litter. Please ensure there is regular sweeping. The same applies to all neighbouring streets. With Woolwich Road & Victoria Way being the worst due to the constant traffic. Please address these issues promptly. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Abandoned Forest bike on Adelphi terrace, 17th May
item.description:
One Forest bike has been abandoned on Adelphi terrace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adelphi Terrace, Covent Garden, City of Westminster

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London

item.title: Overflowing bus stop bins - ongoing issues, 17th May
item.description:
Hi there, The bin on Woolwich Road / Bathmore Road is constantly overflowing and it's not changed daily as it meant to be. Please address this urgently. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on Woolwich Road, 17th May
item.description:
Hi there, This us the usual fly-tipping spot and must be checked daily. Please ensure this is removed asap. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal on public land, 17th May
item.description:
There is a larger dead animal in a plastic bag, which is causing distress to passersby
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pepler Mews, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes, chair and table dumped, 17th May
item.description:
Clothes, chair and table, general rubbish dumped outside our block.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerton Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open bin bags by 54 Charlton Church Lane avain, 17th May
item.description:
Black bin bags left out for thr foxes again in Charlton Church Lane. There must be evidence of the perpetrator from the CCTV camera opposite. Please do clear and prosecute.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lazy bin man, 17th May
item.description:
Pull your fingers out your arseholes, lazy binmen and clear this rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Enfield

item.title: Long grass., 17th May
item.description:
The grass in the Hollies Park is insanely long and it needs to be mowed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Marrabon Close, Blackfen, Greater London

item.title: Multiple trees and branches down., 17th May
item.description:
